---
title: "Next-Generation Application of Perovskite Photovoltaics"
description: "About Event item."
author: "Yifei Yuan"
date: "2026-06-25"
categories: [research, paper]
image: "figure1.JPG"
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---
